title: ‘Who We Are’ Short Film by INDIGEFI
summary: ﻿ Often we don’t see Alaska Natives on the screen and when we do, it doesn’t depict who we are as people today. ‘Who We Are’ is a short film about a young Iñupiaq artists connection to ancestral lands through her painting. With each brush stroke, she reflects on climate change and its effects on Ala...
